sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: By installing or using Falcon, you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the app.

sections.title: 2. Service Description
sections.body: Falcon monitors freelance job platforms, analyzes job listings against your CV using AI-based matching, and delivers push notifications when relevant matches are found. The service is provided as-is and is intended for personal, non-commercial use.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 16 years old to use Falcon. By using the app you confirm that you meet this requirement.

sections.title: 4. Your CV Data
sections.body: By uploading a CV you grant HB Labs SAS a limited license to process that content for the sole purpose of generating job match results for you. You retain full ownership of your CV. We do not share your CV with employers or third parties other than Mistral AI for matching analysis (see Privacy Policy).

sections.title: 5. No Warranty
sections.body:
Falcon is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee:

• The accuracy or completeness of job match scores.
• Uninterrupted or error-free operation of the service.
• That job listings are current, accurate, or available.

Match results are generated by an AI model and should not be the sole basis for any professional or financial decision.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, HB Labs SAS shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of Falcon, including but not limited to loss of data, missed job opportunities, or reliance on AI-generated match results.

sections.title: 7. Acceptable Use
sections.body:
You agree not to:

• Reverse engineer, decompile, or tamper with the app or its backend services.
• Use the service to scrape, harvest, or redistribute job data.
• Attempt to circumvent any rate limits or access controls.
• Upload content that is unlawful, harmful, or violates third-party rights.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
sections.body: The Falcon name, logo, and app design are the property of HB Labs SAS. The source code is available under its respective open-source license. Nothing in these terms grants you rights to use HB Labs SAS trademarks.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the service at any time, with or without notice, if we believe these terms have been violated.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of France. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France.

sections.title: 11. Changes
sections.body: We may update these Terms of Use at any time. Continued use of Falcon after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
